title: Cheapest nonstop flight NYC to London
goal: Find the cheapest nonstop flight from NYC to London departing next Friday and returning Sunday.
constraints: Departure airport must be in NYC area (JFK, LGA, EWR)
Arrival must be in London (LHR, LGW, STN, LTN, LCY)
final_answer: JetBlue B6 120 JFK 21:30 -> LHR 09:10, $418 round trip
rubric: Cheapest nonstop JFK-LHR round-trip departing next Friday and returning Sunday, price within $20 of $418.
notes: Reference answer is a snapshot. Real prices change; the rubric allows $20 drift.
